title: Create a new website

requirements.text: Create a fully functional multi-section landing website with a home hero section, an about section, a features/services section, and a contact/footer section. Each section should be clearly navigable via a sticky top navigation bar.
acceptanceCriteria: A sticky top navigation bar links to each page section (Home, About, Features, Contact).
A hero section is displayed prominently at the top with a headline, subheading, and a call-to-action button.
An About section describes the site's purpose.
A Features/Services section lists key highlights with icons or cards.
A Contact/Footer section includes placeholder contact info and copyright text.
The page is fully responsive on mobile and desktop.

requirements.text: Apply a bold, modern visual theme across the entire site using a dark charcoal and warm amber color palette, clean sans-serif typography, generous whitespace, and subtle card shadows. The style should feel professional and contemporary, with consistent spacing and hover interactions on interactive elements.
acceptanceCriteria: The color scheme uses dark charcoal as the primary background and warm amber as the accent color.
Typography uses a clean sans-serif font applied consistently throughout.
Interactive elements (buttons, nav links, cards) have visible hover state transitions.
The visual theme is applied consistently across all sections.

nonGoals: Backend data storage or dynamic content

required: Abstract dark charcoal hero background with warm amber geometric light streaks and subtle texture (hero-bg.dim_1440x800.png)
Minimal amber-toned abstract logo mark with clean geometric shapes (logo-mark.dim_128x128.png)
